description:
Accounts in the hand of ʿArūs b. Yosef. Contains a number of names and professions such as Joseph, Umm ʿAlī, al-Ḥazzān, al-baqqāl ‘vegetable trader, innkeeper’, al-ṣāniʿ ‘the craftsman’. (Information from CUDL)

Note(s): Handwriting and content similar to T-S AS 152.14, T-S AS 152.38, T-S AS 152.233 and T-S AS 153.18, most them possibly from the same notebook.
description_he: חשבונות בכתב-ידו של עארוס בן יוסף. מכיל שמות ומקצועות כגון יוסף, אום עלי, אל-חזאן, אל-בקאל (סוחר ירקות) ואל-צאניע (האומן).
